description: An integrity engineer analyzes data from a recent PIG run to check for corrosion or defects inside a natural gas pipeline.

nodes.task_description: Ingest and process the high-resolution data from the intelligent PIG tool.

expected_outcome.value: System successfully loads and structures the inspection data.

nodes.task_description: Run an analysis algorithm to detect and classify anomalies, such as metal loss (corrosion) or dents.

expected_outcome.value: Algorithm identifies three areas of minor metal loss and one small dent.

nodes.task_description: Assess the severity of the identified defects against industry standards to determine if immediate repair is needed.

expected_outcome.value: System concludes that all identified defects are within acceptable limits and only require monitoring.
